## Validation

## Checklist

- [ ] I did not add local-only files such as `.codex/`, caches, logs, or generated artifacts
- [ ] I checked for duplicate repository / paper links
- [ ] I kept `README.md` and `README.zh.md` structurally aligned when both were touched
- [ ] I did not create a new taxonomy / subcategory without prior discussion
- [ ] I used official sources where possible
